message:
Command `
# Verify the key state_out from step 67 (last good checkpoint before DRT)
cat /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/67-openroad-repairantennas/state_out.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -m json.tool | grep -E "odb|def" | head -10
echo "==="
# Check the config.json to see what changes were made previously
cat /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/config.json | python3 -m json.tool | grep -E "FP_TEMPLATE|CTS|SKIP|GRT|MAGIC|LVS|IRDROP" | head -20` executed with exit code 0.
